description: You are designing a CRISPR-based knockout screen and need to synthesize guide RNAs targeting Exon 11 of the human BRCA1 gene using the sequence in ~/UGENE_Data/crispr/BRCA1_exon11.fasta. Identify all standard SpCas9 targets (PAM: NGG at 3' end, 20bp target length) on both forward and reverse strands. Export the annotated sequence to ~/UGENE_Data/crispr/results/BRCA1_crispr.gb and the annotation tracks to ~/UGENE_Data/crispr/results/crispr_targets.csv. Record the total number of identified target sites in ~/UGENE_Data/crispr/results/design_summary.txt.
